events.name: Digital Euro Conference 2026
events.description:
The Future of Money Is Now

Money is evolving fast. Stablecoins are booming, tokenized deposits are emerging, and central bank digital currency (CBDC) pilots are gaining speed. Digital money has moved beyond theory ‚Äî it‚Äôs already shaping our financial infrastructure.

On March 26, 2026, the Digital Euro Conference returns to Frankfurt for its fourth edition. #DEC26 brings together central bankers, regulators, financial institutions, fintechs, and innovators to unpack how money is being redefined in practice.

With MiCAR in force, programmable payments growing, and tokenized finance advancing, the market is shifting rapidly. Expect visionary keynotes, sharp panels, interactive roundtables, and cross-sector dialogue. Onsite or online, #DEC26 is where the future of money takes shape.

events.name: Black Hat MEA
events.description: Black Hat Middle East and Africa is a leading cybersecurity conference and exhibition held in Riyadh, KSA. The event brings together cybersecurity professionals, cutting-edge technologies, solution providers, and decision-makers from around the world, condensing several months of networking into just three days.

events.description: The Ethereum Community Conference (EthCC) is the largest and longest-running annual European Ethereum event focused on technology and community. Four intense days of conferences, networking and learning.
